demographics.living_situation: resident in a residential aged-care facility (nursing home) with nursing staff on site

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My legs are so swollen they feel like they are weeping, I can't keep any food down, and I am itching all over. (Call placed with the nursing home staff present, who say he has gone downhill fast over the last few days.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The swelling in the legs has got much worse over the last couple of days and now goes up to the thighs, he has not been able to keep food or fluids down for two days, and he is exhausted and itching everywhere.

symptom_narrative.onset: months of gradually worsening tiredness, with a sharp downhill turn over the last 72 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: a few months of fatigue; the severe leg swelling, vomiting and itching are the last 2-3 days
symptom_narrative.character: heavy, tight, shiny swollen legs; constant nausea with vomiting; itching all over the body with no rash; a metallic taste in the mouth
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: he feels completely wiped out and is stuck in bed; staff say this is the worst they have seen him
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both legs, now up to the thighs; itching over the whole body; nausea in the stomach
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and worsening; up several times overnight to pass urine
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to eat or drink brings the nausea straight back
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: restless legs and muscle cramps at night, poor appetite, a metallic taste, and staff note he looks pale
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: known long-standing kidney trouble that has been slowly getting worse
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound at present because of exhaustion and the heavy swollen legs

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing kidney disease that has been slowly declining
past_medical_history.how_managed: monitored by the GP; on blood pressure tablets

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a residential aged-care facility; nursing staff provide day-to-day care and made the call; high concern about skin breakdown over the swollen legs and poor food/fluid intake

objective_data_offered.value: 88 kg on the facility scales, up about 5 kg from last month
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: facility scales, not a calibrated clinical measurement
single automated reading by facility staff, not a clinician-measured value

objective_data_offered.value: both legs visibly very swollen up to the thighs with tight, shiny skin; he looks pale and tired and is scratching his arms and chest
the jug of water by his bed is still full because he feels too sick to drink; barrier creams for the skin are present but not being used much
